architectureDecision.label: Same branch and stream (workflow-cannon/task-state)
architectureDecision.rationale: Append planning.* events alongside task.* in the existing git-event-log; single hydrate pass and manifest.

readyReview.decision: Planning events share workflow-cannon/task-state branch and unified event stream with task.* kinds.

technicalBreakdown: Add PlanningStateEventKindV1 union with phase_catalog and workspace_status variants.
Define payload types for catalog upsert/remove and workspace status patch (revision, fields).
Add JSON schema files and golden fixtures under task-state-events/fixtures/.
Export planning types from task-state-events index; document shared-stream invariant in instruction capsule.

updates.approach: Extend the Phase 114 canonical event envelope with planning-domain kinds on workflow-cannon/task-state (same branch/stream as task.* events); add golden fixtures and schema validation without breaking existing task.* admission.
